title: Automation pack
body:
Automation modpack

Containing multiple automation mods and quality of life mods.
Meant for people who like Minecraft, but just want to add a lit bit of complexity, more items and possibility to automate things in a factory way.
All the mods run on Fabric, and the modpack is in its early stages.
Meant for Minecraft 1.20.1, and it uses Fabric version 0.15.0.
